response: Did you know there's a gigantic cloud of water vapor floating in space around a black hole 12 billion light-years away that holds **140 trillion times more water than all of Earth's oceans combined**? This cosmic reservoir, discovered near a quasar called APM 08279+5255, is the largest and oldest mass of water ever detected in the universe—showing that water was abundant just 1.6 billion years after the Big Bang! 💧🌌
